summary: Frontend UI testing completed for 6 homepage UI changes. All features verified working: Visa section always visible with 'xxx' placeholders, alternates horizontal scroll with arrows, 8 category cards in horizontal scroll, 'Explore Visa Details' links to /visa, Trip Cost Estimator removed, separators (VISA INTELLIGENCE, SEASONAL TRAVEL GUIDE) displayed correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads successfully with hero section
VISA INTELLIGENCE separator visible between Top Destinations and Visa section
SEASONAL TRAVEL GUIDE separator visible between Visa and Categories sections
Visa section always visible with data-testid='visa-section-always'
Visa Type placeholder shows 'Visa on Arr / E-Visa / Visa Required' when no search
Documents Needed, Processing Time, Cost Estimate show 'xxx' placeholders when no search
8 category cards present: Beach, Mountain, Snowy, City, Cultural, Adventure, Nature, Fitness
Category cards in horizontal scroll with left/right navigation arrows
Explore Visa Details button visible with href='/visa'
Trip Cost Estimator button NOT present (successfully removed)
Search for Thailand shows country in search results
After search: Visa section updates with country-specific data (Thailand = Visa on Arrival)
After search: 'xxx' placeholders replaced with actual visa info
Alternate destinations displayed in horizontal scroll with left/right arrows
Your Choice card highlighted with orange border
Alternative #1 through #5 cards displayed with visa badges
Category card click shows destination recommendations for selected category
Explore Visa Details button navigates to /visa page successfully
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js properly implements all 6 UI changes as specified
Visa section correctly shows placeholder text ('xxx' and 'Visa on Arr / E-Visa / Visa Required') when no search performed
Horizontal scroll implemented for both alternates and category sections with ChevronLeft/ChevronRight navigation
All 8 category cards present with correct icons and labels
Link component properly routes 'Explore Visa Details' to /visa page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 UI changes successfully implemented and tested: 1) Visa section visible by default with placeholders, 2) Alternates horizontal scroll with arrows, 3) 8 category cards (Beach, Mountain, Snowy, City, Cultural, Adventure, Nature, Fitness) in horizontal scroll, 4) Explore Visa Details links to /visa, 5) Trip Cost Estimator removed, 6) Separators added between sections.

placeholder_text.visa_type: Visa on Arr / E-Visa / Visa Required
